phases.label: Flask Basics
phases.description: Routes, templates, and the development server.

topics.label: Hello World & Routes
topics.description: Create a Flask app, define routes with @app.route, and run the dev server.

topics.label: Templates (Jinja2)
topics.description: Render HTML with render_template, template inheritance, and Jinja2 syntax.

topics.label: Static Files & Config
topics.description: Serve static files and configure with app.config and environment variables.

topics.label: URL Building & Redirects
topics.description: url_for for reverse routing, redirect, abort for error responses.

topics.label: Flask-SQLAlchemy
topics.description: ORM integration with db.Model, db.session, and query interface.

topics.label: Flask-Migrate
topics.description: Database migrations with Alembic. flask db init, migrate, upgrade.

topics.label: Forms (Flask-WTF)
topics.description: Form validation and CSRF protection with WTForms.

topics.label: Authentication (Flask-Login)
topics.description: User sessions, login_required, and remember me with Flask-Login.

topics.label: Blueprints
topics.description: Organize large apps with blueprints. Modular application structure.

phases.label: APIs & Testing
phases.description: REST APIs and testing Flask applications.

topics.label: REST APIs
topics.description: Build RESTful APIs with jsonify, request.json, and proper HTTP methods.

topics.label: Flask-RESTful / Marshmallow
topics.description: Structured API development with serialization and validation.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: Custom error pages with @app.errorhandler, abort(), and exception handling.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: Test client, pytest fixtures, and testing views/APIs.
